title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released the TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, ASIC accelerators served via Virgo Network. The video compares these custom chips against general-purpose NVIDIA GPUs and analyzes how scaling strategies affect LLM serving economics and token costs at scale.
